creator: val@packett.cool
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #1)
I've tried using GH_PROJECT=OpenClaw and lowercase name, but it failed (archive name related problems) for some reason. I guess I was using DISTNAME instead of PORTNAME or something. Works now, anyway :D

Re: clawlauncher_freebsd — I didn't want to overwrite the existing _linux file for some reason… that was silly, yeah.

gdiplus — nice catch!

And yeah, "config.xml not found - creating default configuration" does not even create the file… I'll look into fixing that.
